query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, c.tipoConquistaId, c.created_at, tc.nome as conquista_nome, tc.categoria
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN conquistas c ON u.id = c.corretorId
LEFT JOIN tipos_conquista tc ON c.tipoConquistaId = tc.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%kauan%';
